channel.title: Goodiset Swedish Candy Product Feed
channel.description: Product catalog for Goodiset Swedish Candy

item.title: Sour Green Apple Strips
item.description: Bright, tangy, and irresistibly chewy—these Sour Green Apple Strips pack a bold punch of crisp green apple flavor. Coated in a light layer of sour sugar, each bite delivers the perfect balance of sweet and tart, with a soft, ribbon-like texture that makes them super satisfying to eat. A must-have for sour candy lovers who crave that mouthwatering zing!

item.title: Fizzy Dizzy
item.description: Our Fizzy Dizzy lollipop delivers juicy strawberry flavor with a sparkling, slightly sour kick that tingles with every lick. A playful treat that keeps you coming back for more!

item.title: Nordic Apple
item.description: Our Nordic Apple lollipop captures the clean, juicy taste of fresh apples with a cool, slightly tangy finish—just like biting into a perfectly ripe apple in the Nordic air. A simple yet satisfying treat in every lick!

item.title: Blue Mango
item.description: Our Blue Mango lollipop blends the juicy sweetness of ripe mango with a fun, slightly tangy blue twist, creating a bold and refreshing flavor experience in every lick. A unique treat that’s as eye-catching as it is delicious!

item.title: Melon Pop
item.description: Our Melon Pop lollipop is bursting with refreshing melon flavor, giving you a light and fruity treat in every lick. Perfect for when you want something sweet with a cool, refreshing twist!

item.title: Strawberry Swirl
item.description: Our Strawberry Swirl lollipop blends juicy strawberry flavor with a smooth, candy swirl for the perfect balance of sweetness in every lick. A classic treat that’s as fun as it is delicious!

item.title: Pineapple Crush
item.description: Our Pineapple Crush lollipop delivers a refreshing balance of tangy and sweet, just like biting into a perfectly ripe pineapple. A bright, sunny treat that’s perfect for when you need a little escape in every lick!

item.title: Marabou Daim Bites
item.description: Marabou Daim Bites are smooth, creamy milk chocolate pieces filled with crunchy almond caramel. Each bite delivers a perfect contrast of rich chocolate and crisp, buttery toffee, creating a satisfying mix of sweetness and crunch. Ideal for sharing or indulging on your own, they’re a classic Swedish treat with a deliciously addictive texture.

item.title: Bubs Cool Cola Skull
item.description: Sweet, fizzy cola flavor with a soft, chewy texture and a slightly tangy kick. They’re less sour than typical skull candies, making them perfect if you want something balanced and super addictive.

item.title: Mini Sour Cherry Pacifiers- 70 g
item.description: A bold burst of juicy cherry flavour with a tangy sour twist. These soft, chewy mini pacifiers are coated in a fizzy sugar layer for that perfect sweet-meets-sour balance in every bite. Small, fun, and seriously addictive—ideal for satisfying your sour candy cravings anytime.

item.title: Mini Sour Peach Pacifiers- 70 g
item.description: Sweet, juicy peach meets a tangy sour kick in these soft, chewy mini pacifiers. Coated in a fizzy sugar layer, every bite is the perfect balance of fruity sweetness and mouth-watering sourness. Their small size makes them super easy to snack on—whether you’re craving something fun, nostalgic, or just seriously addictive.

item.title: Strawberry Skulls
item.description: Sweet, juicy, and bursting with berry flavor, Strawberry Skulls are a soft and chewy treat you’ll love from the first bite. These fun skull-shaped gummies deliver the classic taste of ripe strawberries with a perfectly balanced sweetness. Deliciously fruity and irresistibly chewy, they’re a bright and tasty addition to any candy mix.

item.title: Pineapple Skulls
item.description: Sweet, tropical, and full of sunshine, Pineapple Skulls are a soft and chewy treat with the refreshing taste of ripe pineapple. These skull-shaped gummies deliver a bright fruity flavor with the perfect balance of sweetness in every bite. Fun, flavorful, and irresistibly chewy, they’re a tropical twist to add to any candy mix.

item.title: Mango Skulls
item.description: Sweet, juicy, and full of tropical flavor, Mango Skulls are a deliciously chewy treat that mango lovers won’t be able to resist. These soft skull-shaped gummies bring the rich taste of ripe mango with a perfectly balanced sweetness in every bite. Fun in shape and bursting with fruity goodness, they’re a bright and flavorful addition to any candy mix.

item.title: Lime Skulls
item.description: Bright, tangy, and bursting with citrus flavor, Lime Skulls are the perfect treat for sour candy lovers. These soft, chewy skull-shaped gummies deliver a refreshing lime taste with just the right balance of sweet and sour in every bite. Bold in flavor and fun in shape, they’re a deliciously zesty addition to any candy mix.

item.title: Grape Skulls
item.description:
Grape Skulls are a bold and juicy treat with a rich grape flavor in every bite.
They have a soft, chewy texture that makes them satisfying and easy to enjoy.

A fruity favorite that keeps you coming back for more.

item.title: Blueberry Skulls
item.description:
Blueberry Skulls are the perfect mix of playful and flavorful.
They offer a rich blueberry taste with a soft, chewy texture that makes every bite satisfying.

A bold fruity treat that’s hard to put down once you start.

item.title: Marabou Dark Chocolate Premium Pecan and Sea Salt 70% 100 g
item.description: Indulge in a rich and refined chocolate experience with Marabou Premium Pecan & Sea Salt 70%. Crafted with deep, intense dark chocolate, this bar delivers a bold cocoa flavor balanced by the warm, buttery crunch of roasted pecans. A touch of sea salt enhances every bite, bringing out the chocolate’s natural richness while adding a subtle savory twist. Smooth, nutty, and perfectly balanced, it’s a sophisticated treat made for true chocolate lovers.

item.title: Redhead Chocolate Dipped Corn Twists- 100 g
item.description: These light and crispy corn twists are coated in a smooth layer of rich chocolate, creating the perfect balance of crunch and indulgence. The airy texture of the corn snack pairs beautifully with the creamy chocolate, giving you a snack that’s both playful and satisfying.

item.title: Estrella Salted Chips- 175 g
item.description: These classic Swedish potato chips are perfectly thin, crispy, and lightly salted to bring out the natural flavor of real potatoes. Simple yet incredibly satisfying, every bite delivers that clean crunch and balanced saltiness that keeps you reaching for more.

item.title: Marabou Oreo Sandwich- 92 g
item.description: This irresistible treat combines Marabou’s signature smooth milk chocolate with crunchy pieces of Oreo biscuit and a rich, creamy vanilla filling. Every bite delivers the perfect balance of silky chocolate, satisfying crunch, and that iconic cookies-and-cream flavor you love.

item.title: Marabou Strawberry- 160 g
item.description: This smooth and creamy milk chocolate is filled with a luscious strawberry flavor that melts perfectly in every bite. The richness of classic Marabou chocolate pairs beautifully with the light, fruity sweetness of strawberries, creating a soft, indulgent treat that’s both comforting and refreshing.

item.title: Personalized Acrylic Boxes
item.description: Make gifting sweeter with our personalized acrylic candy boxes. Each box can be customized with your own sticker design, and you get to choose the candies inside so it feels truly special. Perfect for gifts, events, celebrations, or just treating yourself, these clear acrylic boxes combine a premium look with your favorite sweets for a fun and thoughtful touch.

item.title: Bubs A
item.description: One letter. Lots of candy. Maximum happiness. Choose your letter and we’ll fill it with your favourite sweets for a gift that’s personal, playful, and seriously hard to resist.

item.title: Blue P
item.description: One letter. Lots of candy. Maximum happiness. Choose your letter and we’ll fill it with your favourite sweets for a gift that’s personal, playful, and seriously hard to resist.

item.title: Red A
item.description: One letter. Lots of candy. Maximum happiness. Choose your letter and we’ll fill it with your favourite sweets for a gift that’s personal, playful, and seriously hard to resist.

item.title: Goodiset Bubs Blast- 1 kg
item.description: Goodiset Bubs Blast – 1 KG is the ultimate candy overload, packed to the top with iconic Swedish Bubs candies. This mega mix delivers soft, chewy goodness bursting with vibrant sweet and tangy flavors in every handful. With a colorful variety of fruity pops and sour hits, it’s perfect for parties, sharing, or serious candy lovers who want more of what they love. Big size, big flavors, big blast!

item.title: Goodiset Bubs Blast- 500 g
item.description: Goodiset Bubs Blast is a flavor-packed explosion of iconic Swedish Bubs candies! This mix brings together soft, chewy favorites bursting with bold sweet and tangy notes in every bite. From fruity pops to sour punches, each scoop is a playful blast of color, texture, and mouth-watering flavor. Perfect for sharing, snacking, or treating yourself, Goodiset Bubs Blast delivers a candy experience that’s loud, fun, and totally addictive.

item.title: Goodiset Blue Remix- 1 kg
item.description: Go big on flavor with Goodiset Blue Remix 1 kg! Loaded with extra sweet and sour candy favorites in vibrant blue hues, this bucket delivers maximum tang, sweetness, and non-stop fun.

item.title: Bubs Salty Skulls
item.description: Bubs Salty Skulls are a bold twist on classic gummy candy. These iconic skull-shaped gummies deliver the perfect balance of chewy sweetness with a salty kick that keeps you reaching for more. Packed with intense flavor and that signature Bubs texture, they’re a must-try for anyone who loves sweet-and-salty treats. Addictive, playful, and impossible to eat just one.

item.title: Fizzy Dynamite
item.description: A high-impact sour candy with a smooth fizzy sensation. Fizzy Dynamite offers a strong tangy hit followed by a refreshing fizz that keeps you coming back for more.

item.title: Sugar-Free Elderflower & Raspberry- 70 g
item.description: Enjoy a light and refreshing candy experience with our Sugar-Free Elderflower & Raspberry! This elegant blend combines delicate elderflower notes with the bright sweetness of raspberry, all without added sugar. A perfectly balanced treat you can enjoy anytime.

item.title: Sugar- Free Pineapple-Passion & Blackcurrant- 70 g
item.description: Treat yourself to a burst of tropical flavor with our Sugar-Free Pineapple-Passion & Blackcurrant! This vibrant mix combines juicy pineapple, exotic passion fruit, and rich blackcurrant taste, all without added sugar. A refreshing, feel-good candy perfect for anytime snacking.

item.title: Sugar-Free Strawberry & Cola- 70 g
item.description: Enjoy a guilt-free candy moment with our Sugar-Free Strawberry & Cola! This delicious mix brings together sweet strawberry notes and classic cola flavor, all without added sugar. Perfect for satisfying your sweet cravings while keeping things light. A tasty treat you can enjoy anytime!

item.title: Mini Sour Cola Pacifiers- 70 g
item.description: Enjoy the fizzy, tangy taste of our Mini Sour Cola Pacifiers! Each bite-sized candy bursts with classic cola flavor and a playful sour twist that makes snacking extra fun. Perfect for sharing, snacking, or adding a fizzy kick to your candy collection. 100% gelatin-free and loved by all!

item.title: Mini Sour Watermelon Pacifiers- 70 g
item.description: Experience a burst of tangy sweetness with our Mini Sour Watermelon Pacifiers! Each bite-sized candy is packed with intense watermelon flavor and a fun, sour kick that will make your taste buds tingle. Perfect for snacking, sharing, or adding a playful twist to your candy collection. 100% gelatin-free and a treat everyone can enjoy!

item.title: Mini Sour Bubblegum Pacifier- 90 g
item.description: Fun pacifier-shaped candies with a tangy sour twist and classic bubblegum flavor. Soft, chewy, and playful, these bite-sized treats deliver a sweet-and-sour punch in every piece.

item.title: Bubs Mini Sour Skulls- 90 g
item.description: Mini skull-shaped candies with a tangy sour kick and fruity flavors. Soft, chewy, and irresistibly fun, these bite-sized treats deliver the perfect balance of sour and sweet in every piece.

item.title: Mini Banana Bubs- 90 g
item.description: Sweet and chewy mini banana-flavored candies that melt in your mouth. Perfectly bite-sized, these treats deliver a rich, fruity banana taste in every piece.

item.title: Bubs Mini Blueberry/Raspberry Ovals- 90 g
item.description: Delightful mini ovals with a juicy blend of blueberry and raspberry flavors. Soft, chewy, and bursting with fruity sweetness, these bite-sized treats are perfect for snacking anytime.

item.title: Bubs Cool Raspberry Skull Foam- 90 g
item.description: Soft and fluffy foam candy with a fun raspberry flavor. These light, airy treats melt in your mouth, delivering a sweet and fruity taste that makes every bite enjoyable.

item.title: Bubs Mini Strawberry/Vanilla Ovals- 90 g
item.description: Soft, chewy mini ovals with a delicious blend of sweet strawberry and smooth vanilla flavors. These bite-sized treats are perfectly balanced, fun to snack on, and full of fruity sweetness in every piece.

item.title: Sugar-Free Pineapple-Passion & Blackcurrant
item.description: Indulge in the tropical sweetness of pineapple and the exotic tang of passion fruit, perfectly balanced with the rich, bold notes of blackcurrant. This guilt-free treat delivers a vibrant burst of flavor in every bite, making it the perfect snack for those seeking a refreshing fruity delight without compromising on taste.

item.title: Goodiset Blue Remix- 500 g
item.description: Meet Goodiset Blue Remix, a vibrant candy bucket loaded with sweet and sour favorites. Bright blue treats, punchy flavors, and the perfect balance of zing and sweetness in every handful.

item.title: Marabou Whole Nut 160 g
item.description: Smooth, creamy Marabou milk chocolate blended with crunchy hazelnuts — a perfect mix of rich sweetness and nutty delight. A timeless Swedish favorite that’s irresistibly smooth, satisfyingly crunchy, and perfect for sharing or enjoying on your own.

item.title: Marabou Daim 160g
item.description: Indulge in Swedish milk chocolate studded with crunchy caramel-almond pieces. The Marabou Daim bar blends velvety chocolate with crispy crunchy toffee chips, delivering a delicious balance of smooth melt and bite-through texture. Perfect for sharing, gifting or treating yourself.

item.title: Shock Bite
item.description: This hard candy packs a punch with its deep licorice flavor and an electrifying sour powder core. Each bite starts smooth and ends with a shock, a thrilling twist that wakes up your taste buds and keeps you coming back for more. Not for the faint of heart, this one bites back.

item.title: Energy Pops
item.description: Experience the bold taste of your favorite energy drink in a jawbreaker-style pop that packs a punch. Each pop bursts open to reveal a tangy sour powder center, giving you that electric kick of flavor that keeps you coming back for more. Get ready to crunch, fizz, and feel the energy!

item.title: French Nougat
item.description: Soft, chewy and irresistibly sweet, our French Nougat is a timeless classic made with creamy vanilla flavor and a smooth melt-in-your-mouth texture. Perfectly balanced and delightfully light, it is a treat you will keep reaching for.

item.title: Marabou Swiss Nut 160g
item.description: A true classic from Sweden, with creamy Marabou milk chocolate filled with crunchy roasted hazelnuts. Each bite blends smooth sweetness with a satisfying nutty crunch, making it the perfect treat for chocolate lovers who enjoy a little texture in every square.

item.title: Marabou Orange Crunch 160g
item.description: A delightful mix of creamy Marabou milk chocolate and crispy orange pieces. The smooth chocolate melts in your mouth while the bright citrus flavor adds a refreshing twist, creating a perfect balance of sweet and zesty in every bite.

item.title: Goodiset Premium Sweet & Sour Mix- 500 g
item.description: The perfect clash of flavors in one bucket. Sweet & Sour Surprise brings you the best of both worlds with chewy, juicy candies that flip between sugary smooth and tangy sharp. Every handful is a new adventure, mixing sweetness with a sour twist that keeps you guessing. With 500 g of bold Swedish candy, this bucket is made for those who love a little surprise in every bite.

item.title: Goodiset Skull Squad mix- 500 g
item.description: Join the squad of Sweden’s most iconic candy. The Skull Squad Mix bucket is packed with the classic skull-shaped sweets that candy lovers can’t resist. Sweet, sour and perfectly chewy, every bite brings bold flavor and a playful edge. With 500 g of legendary skulls, this bucket is made for those who like their candy with attitude.

item.title: Goodiset Licorice Legends Mix- 500 g
item.description: A true icon for liquorice lovers. The Licorice Legends Mix bucket brings together bold, rich and irresistibly chewy Swedish Licorice in one powerful 500 g pack. From sweet twists to salty bites, every piece is crafted to deliver that deep legendary flavor Scandinavians swear by. Not for the faint of heart, this bucket is made for real licorice fans ready to taste greatness.

item.title: Goodiset Cola Rush Mix- 500 g
item.description: Get ready for a cola explosion! Our Cola Rush Mix brings together the best cola-flavored Swedish candies in one epic 500 g bucket. From chewy classics to fizzy bites that pack a punch, every piece delivers that bold, refreshing cola kick you crave. Sweet, tangy, and a little bubbly, this mix is made for true cola lovers who want the rush in every bite.

item.title: Goodiset Fizzy Dizzy Dream- 500 g
item.description: Step into a whirlwind of flavor with our Fizzy Dizzy Dream mix! Packed with tangy, fizzy, and fruity Swedish candies, this 500 g bag is made for those who love a little sparkle in every bite. From zesty sours to bubbly treats that tingle on your tongue, it’s a playful mix that guarantees a sugar rush of happiness. Perfect for sharing (or keeping all to yourself), Fizzy Dizzy Dream is your ticket to candy-coated fun!

item.title: Mini Sour Bubblegum Pacifier
item.description: Tiny in size but big on flavor! These playful mini pacifiers pack a sour punch on the outside and turn into a sweet, chewy bubblegum on the inside. A mix of fun and tangy sweetness, they’re the perfect treat for anyone who loves a burst of sour before the chew.

item.title: Mini Sour Pacifiers
item.description: Colorful gummy candies shaped like pacifiers, coated in tangy sugar for a sweet and sour burst of flavor.Fun,playful and irresistibly zesty.

item.title: Soft Strawberry Bites
item.description: Tender, chewy candies bursting with sweet, juicy strawberry flavor.Delightfully smooth and perfectly fruity.

item.title: Sour Raspberry Twins
item.description: A perfect pair of tangy raspberry flavored gummies that deliver a burst of sweet and sour excitement. These twin treats are double the fun, with a juicy punch in every bite.

item.title: Mini Sour Cola Pacifiers
item.description: Small, cola flavored pacifier shaped candies with a bold sour punch. These mini treats combine the classic fizzy cola taste with a tangy twist for a fun and flavorful snack on the go.

item.title: Mini Sour Watermelon Pacifiers
item.description: Chewy gummies shaped like pacifiers with a sweet flavor and a sour twist. These mini pacifiers deliver a fun, tangy punch that’s perfect for a refreshing burst of fruity goodness anytime.

item.title: Sour Cola Lace
item.description: Tangy, sour strands of cola flavoured candy with a sweet and sour kick. Soft, chewy and bursting with that classic cola taste, these playful strings are perfect for twisting, sharing and snacking.

item.title: Strawberry Spaghetti
item.description: Long, chewy strands of strawberry flavoured candy with a bright, juicy taste. Sweet and fruity with just a hint of tang, this fun spaghetti shape makes snacking even more playful.

item.title: Apple Spaghetti
item.description: Chewy spaghetti-shaped candy bursting with tangy green apple flavor! A sweet-and-sour treat that's as fun to eat as it is delicious!

item.title: S Mark Sour Strawberry
item.description: Chewy candy bursting with bold strawberry flavor with vibrant flavor and mouth watering sourness.This  candy is all the way up tart, tasty, and totally irresistible.

item.title: Soft Caramel Bites
item.description:
Soft Caramel Bites: Gooey Meets Crunchy!


These creamy caramel cuties are wrapped in a delicate candy shell with a soft, melt in your mouth center. Sweet, smooth and totally snackable Soft Caramel Bites are your new go to treat for any moment that needs a little magic.

item.title: Goodiset Premium Sour Mix 1 kg
item.description:
Get ready for a sour punch like no other! Our Goodiset Premium Sour Mix is packed with a wild combo of ultra-sour powder and chewy, fizzy candies that tingle your taste buds and leave you wanting more. Each bite brings the perfect balance of sour and sweet bold, fruity and impossible to resist.

Perfect for sour candy lovers, snack time thrill seekers, or anyone who craves that lip-smacking zing.

item.title: Sour Cola Skull
item.description: sour, fizzy and full of attitude!  Our sour cola skulls pack a bold cola punch with a tangy twist that hits just right. Each bite delivers that perfect sweet and sour balance with a cheeky skull shape that makes them as fun to look at as they are to eat. The ultimate treat when you’re in the mood for something deliciously daring.

item.title: Goodiset Sweet Bliss Mix- 1 kg
item.description: This bucket is pure joy in every bite. Goodiset Sweet Bliss Mix is filled with Sweden’s creamiest, chewiest vegan classics only the softest, fruitiest Bubs in mouthwatering strawberry, raspberry and fruity tones. No sour here just sweet, sweet bliss. Perfect for candy lovers with a soft side.

item.title: Goodiset Premium Sweet & Sour Mix 1kg
item.description: The ultimate flavor flip—now in a bucket! Goodiset Sweet & Sour Surprise is packed to the brim with Sweden’s most viral vegan candies like Bubs, zesty Skulls  and fruity S-Mark bites. It’s the perfect grab-and-go mix for parties, gifting, or your next TikTok challenge. Sweet, sour, and seriously addictive.

item.title: Eid Box 1kg
item.description:
Eid Box – Sweet & Sour Mix
Celebrate Eid with a fun mix of sweet and sour Swedish candy! Perfect for sharing with family and friends, this festive box is made to bring joy to every gathering. Limited edition grab yours now!

item.title: S Mark Sour Razzy
item.description:
S Mark Sour Razzy – A Berry Bold Blast!
Get ready for a rush of electrifying flavor! S Mark Sour Razzy delivers a sweet and tangy punch in every chewy bite, making it the perfect pick for candy lovers who crave a bold, juicy thrill.

item.title: S Mark Sour Blackcurrant
item.description:
S Mark Sour Blackcurrant – Bold, Tart and Totally Addictive!
Packed with the deep, rich flavor of blackcurrant and finished with a tangy sour twist, these chewy treats are a must try for fans of bold and fruity candy.

item.title: Sour Cola Strips
item.description: Tangy, fizzy, and full of fun! These chewy candy strips pack the classic cola flavor you love with a sour twist that’ll make your taste buds tingle. Perfect for those who crave a mix of sweet and sour in every bite!

item.title: Melon Sour Skull
item.description: A bold burst of juicy watermelon flavor with a tangy twist! These chewy, skull shaped gummies are 100% vegan, gluten free and gelatin-free, making them a perfect treat for everyone. Coated in sour sugar, they deliver a delightful balance of sweetness and zing in every bite. Ideal for sour candy enthusiasts seeking a plant-based indulgence.

item.title: S Mark Sour Pomegranate
item.description: Bold, tangy and refreshingly fruity! These sour candies bring the rich taste of pomegranate with a zesty kick that keeps your taste buds tingling.

item.title: S Mark Sour Blue Raspberry
item.description: Dive into a bold burst of tangy blue raspberry flavor with these chewy, sour-coated gummies. Crafted in Sweden, these vegan-friendly treats are gelatin free, making them a delightful choice for those seeking a plant based indulgence.

item.title: Marabou Dark Chocolate Premium Fine Orange
item.description: Discover the taste of luxury with Marabou Premium Fine Orange. A refined dark chocolate with the perfect balance of rich cocoa flavor and a refreshing hint of orange. Made from carefully selected ingredients to deliver an irresistible taste experience. Perfect as a luxurious gift or a special treat for yourself.

item.title: Bubs Mini Strawberry/Vanilla Ovals
item.description: soft airily foam candy blending sweet and smooth vanilla flavors. Super light, creamy and perfectly balanced.

item.title: Bubs Raspberry/Licorice Skull Foam
item.description: A Swedish candy classic with a twist! The Bubs Skull – & Raspberry blends the rich, smooth taste of sweet Licorice with the juicy fruitiness of raspberry. This chewy skull-shaped treat is half black, half pink and is fully irresistible. With no sour sugar coating, it’s all about that perfectly sweet balance.

item.title: Fizzy Sour Pacifier
item.description: Playful gummy candy with a pacifier shape, bursting with tangy flavor and a fizzy sour kick.

item.title: Sweet Pastel Fish
item.description: Soft, chewy and delightfully fruity! These colorful fish-shaped candies are a Scandinavian favorite, perfect for sharing or enjoying on your own. A sweet splash of flavor in every bite!

item.title: Sugar-free Strawberry & Cola
item.description: A dreamy fusion of strawberry sunshine and deliciously tempting cola. Enriched with magnesium to help maintain normal teeth.

item.title: Sour Blue Tongues
item.description: Sour Blue Tongues deliver a bold burst of tangy sweetness with every bite. These vibrant blue candies pack a perfect mix of sour and fruity flavor, making them a fun and flavorful treat for all ages. A must-try for sour candy lovers!

item.title: Salt Slid Licorice
item.description: Sugar coated Licorice herrings with a strong salt licorice taste, a good note of salmiak and firm sticky chew.Irresistibly good!

item.title: Salmiak Bar Licorice
item.description: Salmiak Bar is a bold and chewy licorice stick filled with intense salmiak (ammonium chloride) flavor. Wrapped in soft, black licorice, the salty and tangy center delivers a powerful kick that true licorice lovers will appreciate. With its perfect balance of sweetness and salmiak saltiness, this Scandinavian classic offers a rich and satisfying taste experience in every bite.

item.title: Djungleroar Licorice
item.description: Salty licorice candies shaped like wild little jungle creatures, coated in a bold layer of ammonium salt. The first bite hits you with an intense salty kick, but it quickly melts away to reveal the chewy licorice beneath. As the flavor unfolds, a mellow, earthy sweetness emerges less sugary than typical licorice, and more rooted in the natural richness of the licorice root itself. It's a wild ride for the taste buds!

item.title: Bubs Sour Tutti Frutti Foam
item.description: "Tutti Frutti" may be Italian for "all the fruits," but don’t worry—we didn’t use them all. We packed in plenty of fruity flavor and still left some for the rest of the world to enjoy. While the name might give off some continental vibes, this colorful treat has little to do with the boot shaped country by the Mediterranean. It's just pure fruity fun, no passport required!

item.title: Fizzy Sour Skull
item.description: Get ready for a flavor explosion with Sour Bubblegum Skulls! These vibrant blue and pink gummy skulls are coated in a zesty sour sugar, striking the perfect balance between sweet and tangy. Whether you're in the mood for a bold snack or a fun treat to share, these quirky candies are sure to hit the spot.

item.title: S Mark Fizzy Cola
item.description: This iconic S markè shapped gummies bring the bold, refreshing taste of classic cola with an electrifying sour fizz and deliver a perfect balance of sweet and tangy, just like your favorite soda. With each bite, enjoy a nostalgic rush of cola flavor and a playful, fizzy twist that makes them impossible to resist. Whether you're snacking solo or sharing with friends, S-Märke Fizzy Cola is your go-to treat for a bubbly burst of fun!

item.title: S Mark Sour Peach
item.description: Chewy S marke style candies, bursting with intense peach flavor and a tangy sour kick. These treats offer a mouthwatering combination of sweet and sour that’s both refreshing and satisfying. The juicy peach taste delivers a fruity experience that candy lovers will find irresistible. Whether you're treating yourself or sharing with friends, S-Märke Sour Peach is the perfect pick for anyone who enjoys bold, fruity flavors with a nostalgic twist.

item.title: S Mark Sour Peach and Cola
item.description: S-Märke Sour Peach and Cola are oval-shaped gum coin candies from Sweden with a bold blend of sour peach and classic cola flavor. Coated in fine sugar, they offer a tangy, fizzy taste that’s both refreshing and fun a perfect treat for sour candy lovers.

item.title: S Mark Sour Lemon And Raspberry
item.description: Oval-shaped gum coin candies from Sweden with a zesty mix of sour lemon and sweet raspberry flavors. Coated in fine sugar, they deliver a bold, tangy taste that’s both fruity and refreshing perfect for fans of sour and juicy treats.

item.title: S Mark Sour Apple
item.description: S-Märke Sour Apple gummies serve up a crisp, mouth-puckering burst of green apple flavor in every bite. These chewy candies strike the perfect balance between tart and sweet, delivering a sharp sour kick followed by a smooth fruity finish. Bold, vibrant, and addictively tangy—this is sour apple like you’ve never tasted before.

item.title: S Mark Sour Cherry
item.description: A Swedish candy classic S-Märke Sour Cherry are vegan sour gums with an intense cherry flavor. These tangy candies combine the iconic S-Märke shape with a rich and sour cherry character. A perfect treat for those who love really sour candy.

item.title: S Mark Sour Watermelon
item.description: S-Märke Sour Watermelon are sour gummies with a refreshing watermelon flavor. These tangy treats combine the classic S-Märke shape with a summery and zesty watermelon character. A perfect candy for those who love an extra sour kick.

item.title: S Mark Sour Peach/Dragon
item.description: S-Märke Sour Peach & Dragon Fruit are sour gummies with an intense peach and dragon fruit flavor. These chewy treats combine the classic S-Märke shape with a fresh and fruity taste experience. A perfect candy for those who enjoy fruity flavors.

item.title: S Mark Sour Maracuja
item.description: S Mark Maracuja Sour are sour gummies with an intense passion fruit flavor. These tangy treats combine the classic S-Märke shape with a fresh and zesty maracuja character. A perfect candy for those who love a seriously sour bite.

item.title: Acrylic Small Mix Box 100g
item.description:
Check out our Acrylic Small Box 100g – a perfect mix of sour and sweet, featuring the TikTok-viral Swedish candy, Ideal for gifting or treating yourself!

Please note: The candy selection may vary from time to time and may not always match the exact contents shown in the photo.

item.title: Watermelon Sour
item.description:

item.description: Experience the unexpected with Bubs Raspberry/Licorice Mini – a daring combination of fruity sweetness and rich, salty liquorice. Made with vegan-friendly, gelatin-free ingredients, they’re perfect for adventurous snackers who enjoy a twist in every bite. Add some boldness to your candy mix with this unforgettable treat!

item.description: Enjoy the sweet and refreshing taste of Bubs Cool Fruity Pear Mini, the perfect bite-sized treat for any candy lover. A favorite for kids and grown-ups alike, these vegan-friendly treats are perfect for sharing, decorating, or enjoying straight from the bag.

item.description: YOGHURTKLUBBOR 4823077630736 glucose syrup, sugar, acidity regulator (lactic acid, citric acids, sodium lactate), concentrated apple juice 0.5 %, YOGHURT (MILK) 0.25%, flavouring, colouring agents (anthocyanins, beta carotene, paprika extract). May contain SOY LECITHIN.

item.description:

Are you ready to take the sour challenge?

item.description:

Dare to take a bite of Pinky Skull Sour—the candy that’s as bold as it is delicious! These skull-shaped treats may look playful, but don’t be fooled—their intense sour kick will electrify your taste buds before melting into a perfectly sweet finish.

With a mouthwatering mix of tangy fruit flavors and a satisfyingly chewy texture, Pinky Skull Sour is the ultimate treat for those who love a little sour thrill. Whether you enjoy them one by one or challenge your friends to a sour showdown, these skulls are dangerously tasty!

Sour, chewy, and totally addictive—Pinky Skull Sour is the candy that bites back!

Made with real fruit juice and free from artificial colors, Sweet Fruity is a feel-good treat that’s perfect for any moment. Whether you’re craving a quick pick-me-up or sharing with friends, this fruity mix is always a great choice.

Chewy, juicy, and full of natural flavor—Sweet Fruity is a fruity classic that never goes out of style!

Pucker up for a deliciously chewy treat with Red Lips! These soft, lip-shaped candies are bursting with juicy red fruit flavors, delivering the perfect balance of sweetness and a satisfyingly smooth chew in every bite.

Experience the pure, sun-ripened taste of mango in a fun and chewy form with Mango Sheet! Packed with fruity goodness, Mango Sheet is a delicious and wholesome choice for mango lovers looking for a refreshing treat. Whether you enjoy it on the go or as a flavorful snack, this mango delight is sure to brighten your day.


1. Delicious mango flavor

2. Soft and chewy texture

3. A tropical treat for candy lovers

item.description:
Juicy, Chewy, and Bursting with Flavor!

Indulge in the sweet, sun-ripened taste of Peaches, the soft and chewy candy that delivers a deliciously fruity experience in every bite. With a perfect balance of juicy peach flavor and a hint of tangy sweetness, these gummies are irresistibly refreshing and full of summery vibes.

Each bite is like sinking your teeth into a perfectly ripe peach—sweet, juicy, and oh-so-satisfying. Whether you’re craving a fruity snack or just love the taste of peaches, this candy is the perfect treat for any moment.

Step into a world of rich, juicy flavors with Forest Berries—the chewy candy bursting with the taste of ripe berries straight from the forest. Each bite delivers a perfect blend of sweet and tangy flavors, inspired by nature’s finest wild berries.

From luscious raspberries to juicy blackberries and tangy blueberries, Forest Berries bring a delicious mix of fruity goodness in every chew. Whether you’re a berry lover or just craving a fresh and flavorful treat, these candies are sure to satisfy.

item.description:
A Sweet and Tangy Flavor Explosion!

Get ready for a mouth-puckering burst of cherry goodness with Sour Cherries! These chewy, juicy treats strike the perfect balance between bold sourness and rich cherry sweetness, creating an irresistible flavor combination that keeps you coming back for more.

With their vibrant taste and satisfyingly soft texture, Sour Cherries are the ultimate treat for those who love a fruity kick. Whether you enjoy them one by one or by the handful, every bite delivers a tangy twist that lingers deliciously on your tongue.

Tart, juicy, and totally addictive—Sour Cherries bring the perfect sweet and sour punch in every chew!

item.title: Sour Strawberry Strips
item.description:
A Strawberry Sensation with a Tangy Twist.

Bold, juicy, and irresistibly zesty Minicco Sour Strawberry Strips take your taste buds on a thrilling ride. Each soft, chewy strip is bursting with the lush sweetness of ripe strawberries, perfectly balanced by a daring dusting of tangy sour sugar. The result? A flavor explosion that’s both electrifying and indulgent.

Playfully vibrant and decadently chewy, these strips are more than just candy—they’re an experience. Whether you savor them slowly or devour them by the handful, one thing is certain: resistance is futile.

item.title: Nut Creme Delicato Praline
item.description:
A Tiny Bite, A Huge Craving

Warning: This praline nut means business. One bite of its silky hazelnut creme wrapped in smooth chocolate, and you’ll wonder where it’s been all your life. Rich, nutty, and dangerously melt-in-your-mouth, it’s like a little drop of luxury disguised as a snack.

Perfect for treating yourself, impressing guests, or just pretending to be fancy while eating candy in your pajamas.

Go on, take a bite—just don’t say we didn’t warn you.

item.description:
Smooth, creamy, and irresistibly delicious.

With a delicate balance of sweetness and creaminess, Milk Drops are perfect for those who crave a comforting, nostalgic treat. Whether you enjoy them one by one or let them slowly dissolve for a lingering taste, they’re a delightful choice for any occasion.

item.title: Large Sour Wild Strawberry
item.description: These large sour strawberry candies pack a punch with their intense fruity flavor and mouth-puckering sourness.

These thin, chewy caramel strips are perfectly sweet and satisfying, making them a delicious snack anytime.

item.title: Sweet Cola Bottles
item.description: These chewy, cola-flavored gummies capture the nostalgic taste of your favorite soda in every bite. Sweet, tangy, and full of cola goodness, they’re the perfect treat for anyone who loves a bubbly twist on candy.

item.title: Strawberry Chunks
item.description:
A Crunchy Hit of Juicy Strawberry Flavor

Get ready for a bold burst of strawberry goodness! Strawberry Chunks deliver an intense, fruity flavor with a satisfying crunch in every bite. Sweet, vibrant, and packed with ripe strawberry taste, these chunks are the perfect treat for those who love their candy with a little extra texture.

Great for snacking, mixing, or just enjoying straight from the bag—because when it comes to big strawberry flavor, these chunks bring it all.

Crunchy, fruity, and totally addictive!

item.title: Good & Mixed Giants Sour
item.description:
These extra-large sour gummies pack a tangy punch with a delicious fruity twist. Perfect for sour candy lovers!

1. Giant chewy sour gummies

2. Mouth-puckering flavors

3. Great for sour candy fans

item.title: Troflex Fruit Toffee
item.description:
A Juicy Burst of Chewy Goodness.

Soft, chewy, and bursting with fruity flavor.Troflex Fruit Chewy Toffee is a treat that keeps your taste buds entertained with every bite. Each piece delivers a rich, velvety texture and an explosion of juicy sweetness, making it impossible to resist.

With a generous 800g of fruity delight, there's plenty to share (or keep all to yourself—we won’t judge). Whether you're craving a midday pick-me-up or a sweet moment to savor, this toffee brings a little burst of joy with every chew.

A fruity escape, one chewy bite at a time.

item.title: Grape Soda
item.description:
Malaco Grape Soda offers a refreshing, fizzy grape taste in a soft and chewy candy. A must-try for grape lovers!

1. Bold grape soda flavor

2. Soft and chewy texture

3. A fun twist on classic soda

item.title: Mini Sour Dummies
item.description:
Small but Packed with a Zing!

Get ready for a tiny treat with a big sour kick! Dummies Mini Sour are bite-sized, chewy gummies bursting with bold fruity flavors and an electrifying sour coating that will make your taste buds tingle.

With a mix of tangy and sweet flavors like zesty lemon, juicy raspberry, tart apple, and more, these mini gummies are perfect for snacking, sharing, or satisfying your sour candy cravings anytime.

Chewy, tangy, and totally addictive—Dummies Mini Sour are the perfect tiny treats for sour candy lovers!

item.title: Sweet Blue Smileys
item.description:
A Sweet Burst of Blue Happiness!

Get ready to turn your taste buds blue with joy! Smileys Blue is the irresistibly sweet and chewy candy that delivers a mouthwatering explosion of juicy blue raspberry flavor. Each bite is packed with a smooth, fruity sweetness that melts in your mouth, leaving you with a smile as bright as the candy itself.

Soft, fun, and bursting with bold blue goodness, Smileys Blue is the perfect treat for anyone who loves playful flavors and deliciously chewy textures. One bite, and you’ll be grinning from ear to ear!

item.title: Blueberry Chunks
item.description:
A Juicy Blueberry Candy Treat!

These chewy, blueberry-flavored candies have a bold and natural berry taste, making them a favorite among fruit candy lovers.

item.title: Jelly Bee
item.description: Jelly Bee candies offer a delightful burst of vibrant fruity flavors wrapped in a soft, chewy texture. Perfect for both kids and adults, these treats make snacking fun and flavorful anytime you crave a sweet pick-me-up.

item.title: Marabou Japp Double
item.description: Marabou Japp Dubbel is a deliciously indulgent chocolate bar, combining a soft, fluffy nougat center with a layer of rich, golden caramel all wrapped in Marabou’s signature smooth milk chocolate. Each bite delivers the perfect balance of texture and sweetness, making it a go-to treat for chocolate lovers. Whether you're on the move or taking a well-earned break, Japp Dubbel satisfies every sweet craving with its bold and irresistible flavor.

item.title: Marabou Mini Bulk
item.description:
Big Chocolate Joy in a Small Bite

All the creamy, smooth, and irresistible taste of Marabou milk chocolate, now in the perfect bite-sized format! Marabou Mini Bulk delivers pure indulgence in every little piece, making it easy to snack, share, or simply treat yourself without limits.

Perfect for candy bowls, movie nights, or when you just need one more (which, let’s be honest, will turn into five).

Mini in size, massive in flavor!

item.title: Bubblegum Fruits
item.description:
A Fruity Gum Sensation!

This assorted fruit-flavored chewing gum is packed with juicy bursts of citrus, berry, and tropical flavors, making every chew delightful.

1.  Long-lasting fruity flavors

2. Soft and chewy texture

3. Great for freshening your breath

item.title: Lion Heads
item.description: Lion Head candies offer a long-lasting fruity taste with a satisfying hard candy texture. A treat for those who love bold flavors!

item.title: Banana Bubs
item.description: Banana Bubs, a classic Swedish foam candy with an irresistible sweet banana taste. Made with high-quality ingredients and a soft texture, these vegan-friendly banana-shaped sweets are perfect for snacking, sharing, or stocking up for events. Whether you’re a candy lover or looking for bulk treats, Banana Bubs 2.8kg is the perfect choice!

item.title: Red Ammo
item.description:
A Fiery Blast of Bold Flavor!

Get ready for an intense flavor explosion with Red Ammo, the chewy candy that packs a powerful punch! With its deep, bold taste and a hint of fiery spice, this treat is perfect for those who love a candy with attitude.

Whether it's a burst of spicy cinnamon, tangy cherry, or a unique mix of both, Red Ammo delivers a thrilling kick that keeps your taste buds on high alert. Perfect for candy lovers who crave something daring and unforgettable!

Bold, intense, and packed with flavor—Red Ammo is the ultimate candy for those who like it strong!

item.title: Bubs Raspberry/Licorice Skull
item.description: Experience a bold twist on Swedish candy with Bubs Raspberry Licorice Skulls! These playful skull-shaped gummies combine the sweetness of ripe raspberry with the punch of salty licorice for a unique and unforgettable flavor. Soft, chewy, and completely vegan-friendly, they’re perfect for those who love their candy with a little attitude. Sweet, salty, and irresistibly Scandinavian.

item.title: Pez
item.description:
The Classic Candy That Never Gets Old!

Meet PEZ, the timeless candy that’s been delighting generations with its fun dispensers and fruity flavors! These small, rectangular candies may be tiny, but they pack a punch of sweet, refreshing taste in every bite. From tangy citrus to juicy berry flavors, PEZ brings a playful burst of sweetness that keeps you coming back for more.

Whether you love collecting the iconic dispensers or simply enjoy the nostalgic taste of these classic treats, PEZ is the perfect combination of fun and flavor. Pop open a dispenser, load up your favorite flavor, and enjoy a little piece of candy history!

Classic, collectible, and endlessly delicious—PEZ is the candy that makes snacking fun!

item.title: Lemon Bomb
item.description: Get ready for a sour explosion! Lemon Bomb delivers an intense lemon punch with a bold, tangy citrus blast that will leave your taste buds tingling. Made for true sour candy lovers, this super sour treat is not for the faint of heart—just pure, mouth-puckering fun.

item.title: Good & Mixed Giants
item.description:
Bigger, Bolder, and Bursting with Flavor

Why choose one candy when you can have them all? Good & Mixed Giants take your favorite chewy, fruity, and sour treats and super-size them for an even more satisfying bite. Packed with a variety of bold flavors and fun textures, this mix is perfect for those who believe that bigger is always better when it comes to candy.

Perfect for sharing (or keeping all to yourself—we won’t judge).

Go big, mix it up, and enjoy the giant fun!

item.title: Bubs Sour Skulls
item.description:
A Sweet & Sour Showdown!

Indulge in the irresistible taste of Bubs Sour Skulls Chewy fruit Candy! These tangy, chewy candies deliver the perfect combination of fruity flavor and a satisfying texture that will leave you craving more.                                                 
  Enjoy the fun, sour experience in every bite!

item.title: Fizzy Fruits
item.description: Experience the perfect blend of sweet and sour fruity flavors with a light, fizzy twist that makes every bite exciting. This fun and refreshing candy offers a playful texture and a burst of assorted fruit tastes, making it a favorite treat for all ages.

item.title: Salty Raspberry Licorice
item.description:
A Bold Twist on Sweet and Salty!

Get ready for an exciting flavor combination with Salty Raspberry! This chewy treat blends the juicy, tangy taste of ripe raspberries with a surprising salty kick, creating a unique and irresistible balance of flavors.

Perfect for those who love a mix of sweet, tart, and savory, Salty Raspberry offers a bold and adventurous taste experience. Whether you're a fan of salty licorice or just looking to try something new, this candy is sure to keep your taste buds guessing!

Tangy, salty, and deliciously chewy—Salty Raspberry is a must-try for candy lovers who enjoy a little extra edge!

item.title: Licorice Fudge
item.description: Licorice fudge is a luxuriously smooth treat that combines the creamy richness of traditional fudge with the bold, distinctive taste of liquorice. Sweet yet intense, it’s a deliciously unique delight for true Licorice lovers.

item.title: Nut Creme ORIGINAL
item.description:
A Tiny Treat with a Lot to Love

Deliciously round and dangerously irresistible, Nut Creme Original is the perfect bite-sized indulgence. With a silky hazelnut creme center wrapped in smooth chocolate, these little gems deliver a rich and creamy experience that melts in your mouth.

Enjoy them one by one, share (if you must), or go all in—because some cravings deserve to be fully satisfied.

item.title: Sweet Apples
item.description: Enjoy the juicy, fresh taste of ripe apples in every chewy bite of Sweet Apples. Sweet, smooth, and full of fruity flavor—this candy is a refreshing treat for apple lovers of all ages!

item.title: Kiwi Pieces
item.description: Tangy, sweet, and full of fruity flavor—Kiwi Pieces bring the tropical taste of kiwi in soft, chewy bites. A refreshing treat that’s perfect for a unique candy experience!

item.title: Sour Cola Bites
item.description:
A Giant Fizzy Kick of Cola Flavor!

Get ready for an electrifying sour rush with Sour Cola Mega! This extra-large, chewy candy is packed with the bold, refreshing taste of classic cola, intensified by a mouth-puckering sour coating that tingles on your tongue.

With its fizzy soda-inspired flavor and satisfyingly chewy texture, Sour Cola Mega is the ultimate treat for those who love a tangy twist on a classic favorite. Whether you’re a sour candy enthusiast or just looking for a fun, bold snack, this mega-sized cola delight won’t disappoint!

item.title: Fruity Pasta
item.description:
Pasta Frutta Fun & Fruity Experience!

These colorful, chewy candy strips are packed with bold fruit flavors, making them a delightful treat for all ages.

item.title: Pear Bottles
item.description: These chewy, bottle-shaped apple candies deliver a burst of juicy pear flavor in every bite.

item.title: Salted Almonds
item.description:
The Perfect Crunch of Savory Perfection

Simple, classic, and absolutely irresistible—Salted Almonds bring together the perfect balance of golden-roasted crunch and just the right touch of sea salt. Whether you’re snacking straight from the bag or pairing them with your favorite drink, these almonds deliver a rich, nutty flavor that keeps you coming back for more.

Perfect for those who appreciate pure, natural goodness with a salty twist.

item.title: Miami Sour
item.description: A tropical burst of tangy sweetness! Miami Sour packs a zesty punch with fruity flavors that dance between sweet and sour, giving you that sunny, beachy vibe in every bite.

item.title: S-Mark POWDER SUPERSOUR
item.description:
A Shockwave of Sour Intensity!


Brace yourself—S-Mark Powder Supersour isn’t just sour, it’s extreme sour candy powder at its finest. This electrifying sour sugar powder delivers an instant, tongue-tingling explosion of intense tartness, followed by a wave of fruity madness that keeps you coming back for more. It’s bold, thrilling, and perfect for anyone who loves super sour candy.


Sprinkle it, dip into it, or take the ultimate sour candy challenge straight from the pack—however you dare to enjoy it, one thing’s for sure: this is candy powder at its absolute peak!

item.title: Cola Cans
item.description:
A Fizzy Burst of Classic Cola flavour - Chewy Cola Candy

Enjoy the bold and refreshing taste of cola candy in every bite! These chewy cola candy cans bring the classic soda flavor you love, with a sweet and tangy twist. Each piece is soft, delicious, and perfect for satisfying your cola cravings anytime.

item.title: Sour Watermelon Pacifier
item.description: Sour Watermelon Pacifiers, A Sour Melon Explosion! Enjoy the refreshing taste of watermelon with a sour kick in these chewy gummies. Melonbit Sur Mega is a must-try for anyone who loves fruity, tangy treats!

item.title: Sour Melon Chunks
item.description:
A Juicy Blast with a Sour Kick

Get ready for a mouthwatering explosion of melon madness! Sour Melon Chunks deliver the perfect balance of juicy sweetness and tangy sourness, making every bite a refreshing thrill. Soft, chewy, and bursting with bold melon flavor, they’re the ultimate treat for sour candy lovers.

Perfect for when you need a little zing in your snack game—because why settle for ordinary when you can have extra sour, extra juicy, extra fun?

One chunk and you're hooked!

item.title: Blue Eyes
item.description:
A Fun and Fruity Gummy Treat

Blue Eye is a vibrant, deep-blue gummy candy with a soft and chewy texture that delivers a burst of delicious fruity flavor in every bite. Its bold color and smooth consistency make it an exciting addition to any candy selection, perfect for those who love classic gummy sweets with a playful twist. With just the right balance of sweetness and chewiness, Blue Eye is ideal for snacking, sharing, or adding a splash of fun to candy buffets and party mixes.

item.title: Raspberry Twists
item.description:
A Berrylicious Fruit Chewy Candy Delight!


Dive into the irresistible world of Raspberry Twist chewy fruity candy, where every bite is packed with bold, juicy raspberry flavor and a satisfyingly chewy texture. Twisted to perfection, this chewy candy delivers a balance of fruity sweetness and just the right touch of tartness, making it impossible to resist.


Soft, vibrant, and full of mouthwatering berry goodness, Raspberry Twist is perfect for snacking, sharing, or simply treating yourself to a moment of pure raspberry bliss.


One bite, and you’re tangled in a twist of chewy fruity candy perfection!

item.title: Fruity Smilies
item.description:
Malaco Smilies candies bring joyful shapes and delicious fruity flavors to every bite, making them a fun treat for all ages.

1. Soft & chewy texture

2. Bright and fruity flavors

3. Great for sharing

item.title: Marabou Milk Chocolate 160g
item.description:
Smooth, Creamy, and Irresistibly Delicious!

Indulge in the rich and velvety taste of Marabou Chocolate, Sweden’s beloved chocolate treat! This bar is made with good cocoa and the perfect amount of creaminess. It melts easily in your mouth, giving you a smooth and satisfying chocolate experience.

Whether enjoyed on its own, shared with friends, or used in baking, Marabou Milk Chocolate is a timeless classic that never disappoints. One bite, and you'll understand why it’s a favorite among chocolate lovers everywhere!

Creamy, rich, and simply irresistible—This is pure chocolate perfection!

item.title: Sour Cola Pacifiers
item.description: Enjoy a refreshing cola taste with an intense sour twist in every bite of Colanappar Sura! These chewy gummies bring the perfect balance of sweet and tangy flavors, making them an irresistible treat for sour candy lovers.

item.title: Sour Pastel Fish
item.description:
A Soft and Fruity Delight

Dive into a world of sweet indulgence with Pastel Fish, a beautifully crafted candy that combines a soft, chewy texture with a burst of fruity flavors. These charming fish-shaped treats are a true delight for the senses, offering a perfect balance of sweetness and smoothness in every bite.

With their pastel hues and irresistibly tender consistency, Pastel Fish make for a playful and elegant addition to any candy selection. Whether enjoyed as a personal treat, shared with friends, or used to brighten up a dessert table, these delightful sweets are sure to bring a touch of joy to any occasion.

Let every bite take you on a wave of delicious nostalgia!

item.title: Sour Rainbow Strips
item.description:
A Colorful Explosion of Sweet & Sour!

Get ready for a rollercoaster of flavor! Sour Rainbow Strips bring together vibrant colors and bold, fruity flavors, all wrapped in a mouthwatering sour strips candy coating. Each strip delivers the perfect balance of tangy zing and juicy sweetness, making every bite an electrifying treat.

Soft, chewy, and bursting with jummyness, these sour strips are the ultimate way to add some fun to your snacking. Whether you're savoring them slowly or racing through the bag, one thing’s for sure your taste buds are in for a wild ride!

item.title: Sweet Cola Pacifiers
item.description:
A Classic Cola Treat with a Fun Twist!

Enjoy the smooth and refreshing taste of Sweet Cola Pacifiers, the chewy candy that brings the nostalgic flavor of classic cola in a playful pacifier shape. Each bite delivers a perfectly balanced mix of rich caramel cola sweetness with a soft, satisfying chew.

Perfect for cola lovers and candy fans alike, these pacifiers are great for snacking, sharing, or simply enjoying whenever you crave that fizzy soda-inspired flavor.

Chewy, sweet, and irresistibly fun—Sweet Cola Pacifiers are the ultimate treat for cola candy lovers!

item.title: Skittles Fruits
item.description:
Taste the Fruity Fun!

Get ready for a burst of bold, juicy flavor with Skittles Fruits, the classic chewy candy loved by millions! Each colorful piece is packed with intense fruit flavors, delivering a sweet and tangy explosion in every bite.

With a delicious mix of strawberry, orange, lemon, green apple, and blackcurrant, Skittles Fruits offer the perfect balance of sweetness and zest. Whether you eat them one by one or mix them for a unique flavor combo, these little treats are guaranteed to brighten your day.

item.title: Fizzy Melon Bubblegum
item.description:
Fizzy Melon Bubblegum Experience Like No Other!

This fizzy, chewy bubblegum delivers an explosion of sweet melon flavor with a tingling sensation for an exciting chew.

item.title: Sour Blue Smileys
item.description:
These chewy and sour blue smiley gummies pack a delicious, sweet, and tangy punch in every bite.
1. Sour and fruity flavor
2. Fun smiley shapes
3. Great for sour candy fans

item.title: Fizzy Blue
item.description:
Fizzy Blue – A Sweet & Sour Rush!

Get ready for a bold and tingly candy experience! Fizzy Blue combines the perfect balance of sweet and sour with an electrifying blue raspberry flavor.

Each bite delivers a fizzy, mouthwatering sensation that keeps you coming back for more. Whether you love sour treats or just want a fun, refreshing candy, Fizzy Blue is the perfect choice for a flavorful adventure!

Sweet, sour, and irresistibly zesty—Fizzy Blue is a flavor adventure in every bite!

item.title: Fizzy Balls
item.description:
Fizzy balls, Sweet & Fizzy Delight!

These chewy candy balls burst with fruity flavors and a fizzy kick, making them an exciting treat for sour candy lovers.

1. Tingling, fizzy sensation

2. Bright fruity flavors

3. Fun and chewy texture

item.title: Chocolate Toffee
item.description:
Chocolate-Caramel Perfection!
This chewy, chocolate-infused caramel offers the best of both worlds, combining deep cocoa flavors with smooth, buttery caramel.

item.title: Big Ferrari Pieces
item.description: A beloved treat from Sweden, these chewy gummies are bursting with sweet, fruity flavor. Fun, flavorful, and iconic, they are a playful snack that brings joy to candy lovers of all ages.

item.title: Nut Creme Creamy peanut
item.description:
Pure, peanut love.

Peanut butter lovers, this is your moment! Nut Creme Creamy Peanut is the ultimate combination of silky smooth peanut creme wrapped in rich, melt-in-your-mouth chocolate. It’s creamy, nutty, and just the right amount of indulgent—because some cravings deserve the deluxe treatment.

Snack on it, savor it, or grab a whole stash (we won’t judge). One bite, and you’ll understand why peanut dreams are made of this.

Warning: May cause instant obsession. Stock up accordingly.

item.title: Nut Creme PUNCH ROLL
item.description:
A Nutty Knockout of Flavor!


Crunchy? Nope. Boring? Never. Nut Creme Punch Roll is here to deliver a smooth, creamy hazelnut punch wrapped in a soft, chewy nut roll candy that practically melts in your mouth. It’s rich, it’s flavorful, and let’s be real—you won’t want to share.

Perfect for sneaky snacking, afternoon pick-me-ups, or just treating yourself like the royalty you are.

Warning: May cause uncontrollable cravings. Proceed with delicious caution!

Let me know if you want any more tweaks!

item.title: Nut Creme Original Hazelnut
item.description:
A Hazelnut Classic That Never Disappoints

Smooth, creamy hazelnut praline filling wrapped in rich, velvety chocolate—Nut Creme Original Hazelnut is pure delight in every bite. The perfect balance of nuttiness and sweetness, this hazelnut candy treat melts effortlessly in your mouth, leaving you craving just one more.
A must-have for hazelnut chocolate candy lovers and chocolate enthusiasts alike.


1. Delicious hazelnut cream center

2. Smooth chocolate coating

3. Perfect bite-sized indulgence

item.title: Smurfs
item.description:
A Magical, Chewy, and Fruity Delight!

Step into a world of fun with Smurfs candy, the irresistibly chewy and colorful treats inspired by your favorite blue characters! Bursting with fruity flavors, these playful gummies deliver the perfect balance of sweetness and softness in every bite.

With their unique shapes and delicious taste, Smurfs candy brings a nostalgic and exciting twist to your candy collection. Whether you enjoy them one by one or by the handful, these little blue gummies are guaranteed to put a smile on your face.

item.title: Big Witch Howl Licorice
item.description:
Big Witch Howl Sour Candy – A Spooky Sour Spell!

Unleash a bold burst of tangy, sour flavor with this fun, witch-themed candy. Perfect for Halloween treats or anytime you want to add a little spooky excitement to your snacking.
